task_description: Add bidirectional integration between Permohonan Dana / Dana Masuk transaction pages and their respective Forecast Pembayaran / Forecast Penerimaan monitor pages. Add forecast buttons on transaction pages and action buttons on forecast pages for overdue items to directly create transactions.

verification.summary: node --check keuangan-app.js passes (no syntax errors). No build system or test framework exists in this project. Code reviewed manually - all changes follow existing patterns.
